settings.title: Password Strength Indicator Settings
settings.weakColorHex_help: Shown when a password is rated as weak.
settings.mediumColorHex_help: Shown when a password is rated as medium strength.
settings.strongColorHex_help: Shown when a password is rated as strong.
settings.enableInputColor: Change input's foreground color with password strength score
settings.enableInputColor_help: Tints the typed password text with the strength color while the password is hidden.
settings.enableInputBorderColor: Change input's border color with password strength score
settings.enableInputBorderColor_help: Colors the password field's border to match the strength color.
settings.enablePasswordToggle: Enable password visibility toggle for both Sign Up and Log In modals
settings.enablePasswordToggle_help: Adds an eye button that lets users reveal the password they are typing.
